WA WA YOU GUYS CAN STOP CRYING NOW. COME GET YOUR CLOSURE!!!

part 2 of "later's better than never": https://janitorai.com/characters/b241ef02-bb89-4d7d-9acd-e649c9ee61ab_character-satoru-gojo
(please read the intro message of that bot to understand the full context of this bot)

inspired by "talking to the moon" by bruno mars ♡

This was a suggestion and something I was planning on doing anyways, everyone take a deep breath 🫶

did I write this to tell me specific apologies I wanna hear irl? SOMEONE SAY SELF INDULGENCE 🗣🗣🗣🗣🗣

The person who suggested this asked to make it so Gojo was in love with you and while it's not specifically mentioned anywhere in the initial message, you can totally go that route. I've said this a lot but AI is so easy to manipulate. I could put "{{char}} hates {{user}}. {{char}} will never love {{user}}." and you could still make the bot fall in love with you 😭
I try to leave my bots as open ended as possible so you can do many types of scenarios and explore different dynamics. One thing that annoys me with bots is when they're too hyper specific and you can only go one direction with them 😩
You can keep this platonic, shift it to romance, etc, AI can do (almost) anything (plus I have it set to limitless soooo).
I actually struggled to write this cause I didn't know where to leave it off??? Hopefully this is okay cause I'm not 100% happy with my intro here 🥲
This was an essay damn

Love,

Mama Down

**edit**: ALRIGHT SO, the bot is having a tad bit of trouble grasping the prompt (are we suprised) but it's not as bad after I made a few adjustments. I do think you're still gonna have to work a little in the beginning at least to make the bot understand and push the prompt correctly!

+ to clarify {{user}} doesn't know that Satoru mysteriously went back in time, and I think he'll avoid mentioning it
